scenarios.description: parse(File, String charsetName) returns Document and uses file absolute path as baseUri when charsetName is non-null
scenarios.precondition: temp HTML file exists with UTF-8 content
scenarios.expectedResult: return Document with baseUri equal to file.getAbsolutePath() and body contains file HTML
pseudocode: TEST TC19 parse(File, charsetName) valid overload

File file = create temp file with "

Test

" in UTF-8;

scenarios.description: parse(Path) returns Document and uses path.toAbsolutePath as baseUri for default charset
scenarios.precondition: temp HTML file created at Path with BOM-less UTF-8 content
scenarios.expectedResult: return Document with baseUri equal to path.toAbsolutePath().toString() and body contains markup
pseudocode:
Path p = write temp HTML file with "
PathTest
";

scenarios.description: parse(Path, String charsetName) returns Document using explicit charset and path absolute as baseUri
scenarios.precondition: temp HTML file exists at Path with ISO-8859-1 content
scenarios.expectedResult: return Document with baseUri equal to path.toAbsolutePath().toString() and body contains ISO-encoded markup
pseudocode: TEST TC21 parse(Path, charsetName) valid overload
Path p = write temp HTML file with ISO-8859-1 encoded "Å";

scenarios.description: parse(Path) throws IOException when path does not exist
parse(InputStream, String charsetName, String baseUri, Parser) uses provided Parser overload on InputStream
scenarios.precondition: ByteArrayInputStream over XML fragment and xmlParser provided
scenarios.expectedResult: return Document parsed by provided Parser with correct baseUri and body content
pseudocode: Document doc = Jsoup.parse(in, charset, baseUri, parser);
